summary: Full player journey audit: IntroCeltOS→Menu3DPC→ParchmentPreRun→BroceliandeForest3D→HubAntre. 1 CRITICAL (orphan MerlinGame.tscn routing), 2 HIGH (orphan scenes on disk), 2 MEDIUM (dead consts), 1 MEDIUM (race condition potential), 6 PASS.

findings.description: _on_hub() routed to GAME_SCENE (MerlinGame.tscn) when _merlin_found=true. MerlinGame.tscn is orphaned — card encounters are handled via encounter_card_overlay.gd WITHIN BroceliandeForest3D. Fix: always route to HUB_SCENE (HubAntre.tscn).
Director q-20260414-005 ordered deletion (B: Supprimer IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin). Files still on disk. Task E2E-DELETE-ORPHAN-SCENES P3 pending.
Director q-20260414-005 ordered deletion. Still on disk + .uidren artifact. Also quiz_data.gd, rencontre_dialogue.gd, rencontre_llm.gd are support scripts that should be deleted together.

SCENE_TRANSITION = 'res://scenes/TransitionBiome.tscn' defined but no button/signal in HubAntre.gd transitions to it. TransitionBiome.tscn exists and has complex logic. Unclear if dead or intended for future use.
SCENE_MAPMONDE defined but no button triggers it. MapMonde.tscn listed as 'archive/scenes_unused/MapMonde.tscn' in screenshot_scenes.gd — may already be archived but const not cleaned up.

GameManager adds MerlinStore via call_deferred('add_child', store). SelectionSauvegarde and BroceliandeForest3D use get_node_or_null('/root/MerlinStore'). If loaded the same frame as GameManager, store may be null. In practice OK due to multi-frame load chain, but fragile.

findings.check: GAME_SCENE const now unused in broceliande_forest_3d.gd
findings.description: After SF-001 fix, GAME_SCENE const (MerlinGame.tscn) is defined but never referenced. Dead code. Should be removed in a cleanup task.
Only referenced in screenshot_scenes.gd (test tool). No game scene transitions to it. Candidate for archive.
ui_overlay_endscreen.gd:134 btn_hub → HubAntre, :140 btn_new → BroceliandeForest3D — both correct.
All 14 autoloads in project.godot verified to have corresponding files. 0 missing.

test_tasks_executed.details: SelectionSauvegarde._on_continue_pressed() awaits store.dispatch(LOAD_PROFILE) before transitioning. GAME_SCENE correctly = HubAntre.tscn. Fallback to _build_profile_ui() on failure. MerlinStore available via GameManager autoload deferred add_child.

MerlinStore NOT in project.godot autoloads directly. GameManager (autoloaded) creates it via call_deferred at line 673-677. BroceliandeForest3D._find_store() handles null gracefully (fallback mode). Timing race is theoretical — multi-frame scene load chain ensures store is ready. Note: fragile — see SF-006.
caveats: MerlinStore availability depends on GameManager deferred call timing

test_tasks_executed.details: FACTION_SCORE_START=20 in merlin_constants.gd:1081. Used consistently in: merlin_store.gd:200-204 (all 5 factions), merlin_effect_engine.gd:421, merlin_skeleton_generator.gd:46. test_constants_bible_alignment.gd:47 asserts == 20. 0 hardcoded 0-start values found.

dev_task_implemented.change: Removed GAME_SCENE conditional from _on_hub(). Now always routes to HUB_SCENE (HubAntre.tscn). Updated comment to reflect card overlay architecture.
dev_task_implemented.impact: CRITICAL fix — prevents game from routing to orphaned MerlinGame.tscn after Merlin encounter. Ensures forest walk always returns to HubAntre.
